full_text:
Chen Biao (Wenao) 陳表 (文奧)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Biao (陳表), styledWenao (文奧). Chen Wu’s son. Advised Sun Deng with Zhuge Ke, Zhang Xiu, and Gu Tan. Chen Biao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Chen Biao lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
